description_long: This is a green and white video game controller, prominently featuring the Palmeiras football club logo and branding. The front face displays a circular Palmeiras crest at the center, surrounded by white stars and stylized buttons, with two analog sticks and a D-pad. The shoulder buttons and triggers are white, contrasting with the green body, and the rear side features a large white 'P' in a classic font. The controller has a smooth, ergonomic shape designed to fit comfortably in the hands, with all standard controls for modern gaming. The materials appear to be primarily plastic with some internal metal components for circuitry and button mechanisms. The overall finish is sleek and glossy, giving it a premium look and feel.
description: A green and white Palmeiras-branded video game controller with a glossy finish, featuring the club's logo, stars, and standard gaming controls.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Palmeiras logo, white stars, analog sticks, D-pad, and main control buttons.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the controller's ergonomic curve and white shoulder buttons.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a large white 'P' and the smooth, uninterrupted green surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other set of shoulder buttons and the controller's contoured grip.
attribute_control_interface: physical buttons, analog sticks, D-pad, triggers
